expectations.text: Does NOT proceed with analysis — asks clarifying questions first
expectations.evidence: The response immediately enters 'Phase 0: Clarification Required' and states 'I will not proceed until these questions are answered.' No analysis was performed.

expectations.text: Uses Flipped Interaction pattern: proposes interpretation and asks for confirmation
expectations.evidence: Under 'Phase 0-3: Clarifying Ambiguity (Flipped Interaction)', the response proposes a concrete interpretation: 'Scope: Server-side code only... Depth: Function-level analysis with call chains... Focus: All 6 axes' and asks 'Does this match your intent?'

expectations.text: Asks which project path to analyze
expectations.evidence: Under 'Phase 0-1: Project Path -- MISSING': 'I need a project path to analyze. You said "the backend" but I don't know which project you're referring to.' Also asks 'Which project? Please provide the full path to the codebase.'

expectations.text: Asks about scope (what 'backend' means in this context)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly asks: 'What counts as "backend"? Is it a standalone backend repo, or part of a monorepo? If monorepo, which directory contains the backend code?'

expectations.text: Does NOT write analysis files without user confirmation
expectations.evidence: No files were written. The response ends with 'I will not proceed until these questions are answered. Maximum 3 rounds of clarification, then analysis begins.'
